texto: ...God is already out there in the world ahead of us. In our teaching, therefore, we must do more than merely help people learn how to be good church members. We are directors preparing people for roles in a drama that encompasses every part of their lives.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Richard Robert Osmer sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “...God is already out there in the world ahead of us. In our teaching, therefore, we must do more…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, education, teaching, útil em momentos de teaching.
